items.briefing:
Cyberattacks globally jumped 17% in June compared to last year, meaning Australian organisations including RTOs face a growing threat environment. Separately, a recent Telstra outage highlighted how dependent Australian businesses are on single carriers — if your training operations rely on one internet or phone provider, a disruption could leave you unable to deliver classes or support students. Microsoft has also patched a zero-day vulnerability, so ensuring devices are up to date is important right now.

Social engineering — where attackers trick staff into handing over access or information — remains a top threat for education providers. Be cautious of unexpected emails, calls, or messages asking you to click links or share login details.

**Tip:** Check that your devices have received the latest Microsoft updates today.

featured.title: Telstra outage exposes Australia's reliance on carriers
featured.quote: National infrastructure vulnerability exposed by Telstra outage threatens business continuity and emergency services.
